title: A pilot and a passenger saw a UFO for 15 minutes near Fortaleza [2014]
excerpt: July 12th, 2014. Halfway between Juazeiro do Norte Airport and Fortaleza Airport, both in the State of Ceará, 2 people, including the pilot of the flight PTWRG aircraft, observed at 8:00 pm, under a clear sky and good visibility, a low-speed movement of a white and red unidentified flying object with a circular shape. The […]
text_preview: July 12th, 2014. Halfway between Juazeiro do Norte Airport and Fortaleza Airport, both in the State of Ceará, 2 people, including the pilot of the flight PTWRG aircraft, observed at 8:00 pm, under a clear sky and good visibility, a low-speed movement of a white and red unidentified flying object with a circular shape. The sighting lasted fifteen minutes. The relatively large object, according to witnesses, was approximately 9,000 feet high and about 15 MN [nautical miles] away from the observers’ plane. In the report of the same pilot, who also informed having seen this type of light before, t
summary: Pilot and passenger of flight PTWRG observed a circular white and red UFO for 15 minutes at 9,000 ft between Juazeiro do Norte and Fortaleza.
